title: $3.7 Million is Available to Support Clean Hydrogen-Based Fuel Cell Resources in New York
content: The New York State Energy Research and Development Authority (NYSERDA) announced $3.7 million is now available to support clean hydrogen-based fuel cell resources in New York. Todayâ€™s announcement will advance the development and demonstration of innovative fuel cell technologies as a potential dispatchable solution to maintain grid reliability and resilience and decarbonize industrial processes while integrating increasing amounts of renewable energy like wind and solar.
author: Analysts Account
